title: Operation Host
description:
Purpose:

To ensure safe and effective management of the Luge and Skyrides daily operation and ensuring the highest standards of safety and customer service to the guests. Operation Host works in rotation and will at anyone point be responsible for the following function.


Description of Job:

1. The Luge Operation Host will be responsible for completing pre-opening checks as per SOP and in a timely manner.

  1. Complete all pre-opening safety checks as per SOP
  2. Clean all public areas meticulously, with rubbish on the floor promptly picked up.
  3. Regularly empty rubbish bins are and to maintain good presentation throughout the site.
  4. Switch on TV displays showcasing safety information and direction and ensure they display to correct content throughout the day.
  5. Ensure all closing tasks are completed in due diligence.

2. The Luge Operation Host will be responsible for ensuring that H&S of guests and staff alike is always maintained.

  1. Ensure guests meet the height requirements to ride the Luge and Skyride.
  2. Provide high quality safety briefing to guests and ensure all critical information are covered (brake, steering, hands on the handlebar including child doubling, feet inside the cart, riding position for young riders)
  3. Carefully manage the bottom conveyors area to minimise the risk of collision
  4. Ensure guests are provided with adequate guidance when boarding and disembarking from the Skyride as per SOP.
  5. Check and scan guest tickets at designated locations (these may change based on crowd)
  6. Strictly adhere to the Code of Conduct for Luge riding and Skyride boarding.
  7. Handle the Luge cart as per SOP to minimise damage to material and equipment

3. The Luge Supervisor Operation will be responsible for delivering high quality interactions with Guests.

  1. Adhere to Skyline Luge Service Standard Charter at all times
  2. Ensure the needs of the guests are given priority over all other activities.
  3. Pro-actively attend to guests at any point of the of their journey in the view to deliver positive interactions through 1on1 attention
  4. Should issue with guest arise, escalate to Team Leaders or Supervisor immediately.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


Work Location: 45 Siloso Beach Walk, Sentosa, Singapore 099003

postedCompany.description:
Invented in New Zealand over 29 years ago, and having hosted over 31 million rides worldwide Skyline Luge Sentosa is the first-ever Luge introduced in Southeast Asia and has since hosted over 10 million rides!


Luge is a fun-filled gravity thrill ride which is safe for all ages.  With a unique braking and steering system, you can choose to take a leisurely cruise or race down four thrilling Luge tracks with specially designed features including hairpin corners, exhilarating tunnels and exciting downhill slopes. Take your pick between the Dragon Trail, Jungle Trail, or try one of our two new tracks, Expedition Trail and Kupu Kupu Trail, that twist and turn through the mystical forest - riding through the day or night!

The experience is never complete without the Skyride.  Board the Skyride for a scenic bird’s eye view of Sentosa Island, Singapore city skyline and South China Sea.  You will alight at Imbiah Lookout to kick start your exhilarating experience all over again!


Once is never enough! As darkness settles, a whole brand-new adventure awaits you.  You will discover a different challenge while manoeuvring down the colorfully lit tracks and on the Skyride, enjoy a different breathtaking view of Sentosa and Singapore as the city skyline and harbor transform into a dazzling city of lights at night
postedCompany.name: SKYLINE LUGE SINGAPORE COMPANY PTE. LTD.
